title: Rajkot、Gujarat — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Rajkot、Gujarat的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Rajkot是Gujarat的一个城市，人口约1,500,000。A major industrial center in Gujarat, known for its engineering and automotive industries, and as the hometown of Mahatma Gandhi.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
